name: Creamy Fruit Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart bowl, combine the fruits (except the whole berries), cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate until well chilled, at least 2 hours.
2. To serve, spoon 2 tablespoons of whipped topping (thawed frozen non-dairy) into each of 6 parfait or sundae glasses.
3. Top each portion with 1/4 cup of the fruit mixture.
4. Add an equal amount of remaining fruit mixture to each portion.
5. Spoon 1 tablespoon of whipped topping onto each portion of fruit.
6. Sprinkle with 1 teaspoon of shredded coconut and garnish with 1 strawberry per serving.
7. Each serving contains approximately 116 calories.
